videos.title: Synthetic repetitive-motion fixture
videos.description: Public-safe synthetic proxy video used to demonstrate routing, evidence review, and timeline decoding.

videos.title: Synthetic hard-negative motion
videos.description: Public-safe counterexample with non-target motion for reviewing candidate-filter behavior.

videos.title: Synthetic late-onset behavior
videos.description: Public-safe fixture with a long static lead-in before a short late target-behavior interval.

videos.title: Synthetic short clip smoke test
videos.description: Two-second public-safe fixture for demonstrating clip-mode routing and annotation playback.

saved_runs.title: Public static evidence demo
saved_runs.description: Sanitized long-form-style presentation bundle served without the local FastAPI backend.

saved_runs.title: Public static hard-negative demo
saved_runs.description: Sanitized confounder presentation showing routed non-target motion without a target behavior episode.

saved_runs.title: Public static late-behavior demo
saved_runs.description: Sanitized late-onset presentation showing static lead-in, routed behavior evidence, and a short decoded episode.

saved_runs.title: Public static short-clip demo
